hooks.command: if echo "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" | grep -qE '\.(ts|js|json|svelte)$'; then bunx biome check --write "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" 2>/dev/null; fi; exit 0
case "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" in */bun.lock|bun.lock) echo 'BLOCK: Do not edit lock files directly. Use bun install instead.' && exit 1;; esac; exit 0
